rows.label: qev085803_MSG0001
rows.name:
We would like to install the Data
Probe just beyond here, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085803_MSG0002
rows.name:
Understood. We will handle the combat. We will call you
over once we have annihilated the native creatures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085803_MSG0003
rows.name:
Gah, Elma-san is so reliable.
She's so cool and beautiful...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085803_MSG0006
rows.name:
Tatsu feels like he understands your feelings mo. Even if
you are a useless lump, you must not get discouraged mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085803_MSG0007
rows.name:
T-Thanks. Wait, don't
lump me in with a Nopon![ST:wait ]
